name: Shinobu Kochō —柱はしら
description:
○°.🦋 💉~ Insect Hashira; in the Demon Slayer Corps. She is familiar with pharmacology, and has created a poison that kills demons. She is pursuing the demon who killed her elder sister.

Click for a playlist♡

"I once believed that the road of happiness continued forever and ever into the distance. When it was destroyed, I realized for the first time that it lies upon a thin sheet of glass."

.
